zh.lifeSummary: John de Argentine是Reginald d'Argentine和Laura de Vere的兒子，於大約1278年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。他於1317年4月之前與Agnes Bereford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1318年10月20日之前在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾，埋葬在英國賀特福爾巴爾多可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Argentine是Reginald d'Argentine和Laura de Vere的儿子，于大约1278年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾。他于1317年4月之前与Agnes Bereford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1318年10月20日之前在英国英格兰坎布利其爾，埋葬在英国賀特福爾巴爾多可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: John de Argentine was born about 1278, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Reginald d'Argentine and Laura de Vere. He married Agnes Bereford before April 1317. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 20 October 1318, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Baldock, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Argentine est né environ 1278, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Reginald d'Argentine et Laura de Vere. Il a épousé Agnes Bereford avant avril 1317. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 20 octobre 1318, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Baldock, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John de Argentine wurde um 1278 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Reginald d'Argentine und Laura de Vere geboren. Er hat vor April 1317 Agnes Bereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 20. Oktober 1318 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Baldock, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John de Argentine è nato il circa 1278 nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Reginald d'Argentine e Laura de Vere. Lui sposato Agnes Bereford prima del aprile 1317. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 20 ottobre 1318, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Baldock, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Argentineは約1278年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでReginald d'ArgentineとLaura de Vereの息子として生まれた。1317年4月以前にAgnes Berefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1318年10月20日以前にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアボードックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Argentine(은)는 대략 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Reginald d'Argentine(와)과 Laura de Vere의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1317년 4월 이전 Agnes Bereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1318년 10월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 볼독에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Argentine nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Reginald d'Argentine e Laura de Vere. Ele casou-se com Agnes Bereford antes abril de 1317. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 20 de outubro de 1318, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Baldock, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Argentine родился около 1278 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Reginald d'Argentine и Laura de Vere. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Bereford перед апрель 1317 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 20 октябрь 1318 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности балдокк, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John de Argentine nació aproximadamente 1278, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Reginald d'Argentine y Laura de Vere. Se casó con Agnes Bereford antes de abril de 1317. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 20 de octubre de 1318, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Baldock, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
